title: AI Data Transformer
description:
Transform datasets using natural language prompts powered by AI.

**3 pricing tiers:** Basic ($0.0015), Premium ($0.20), or BYOK ($0.05 + your API costs).

**Quick start:** Paste a URL to your CSV and type something like 'group by category and sum values'.

📚 [Documentation](https://github.com/lorenzode/ai-data-transformer)

datasetUrls.title: 📁 Dataset URLs
datasetUrls.description: URLs to your data files (CSV, JSON, Excel, Parquet). Add multiple URLs to merge files together.
datasetUrls.sectionDescription: Provide one or more data sources. Multiple files will be automatically merged.

uploadedFiles.title: 📤 Upload Files
uploadedFiles.description: Or upload files directly (CSV, JSON, Excel, Parquet). Max 50MB per file.

apifyDatasetId.title: 📊 Apify Dataset ID
apifyDatasetId.description: Or use an existing Apify dataset from another Actor run

datasetId.title: 📊 Dataset ID (API/Integration)
datasetId.description: Apify Dataset ID to transform. Simple alternative for API calls and integrations. Example: 'abc123def456'

resource.title: 🔗 Webhook Payload
resource.description: Auto-populated when triggered via webhook/integration from another Actor. Contains defaultDatasetId from the previous run. Leave empty - filled automatically by Apify.

inputData.title: 📋 Direct JSON Data

prompt.title: 💬 Transformation Prompt
prompt.description: Describe your transformation in plain English. Be specific about column names, aggregations, filters, and sorting.
prompt.prefill: Group by 'Country' and calculate the sum of 'Confirmed' cases. Sort by total confirmed descending. Show only the top 20 countries.
prompt.sectionCaption: 🎯 What do you want to do?
prompt.sectionDescription: Write your transformation request as if explaining to a colleague. The AI generates and executes the code for you.

useAdvancedFeatures.title: 💎 Use Advanced Features
useAdvancedFeatures.description: Enable Premium tier: Gemini 2.5 Pro + Google Search grounding + RAG memory. Works with hosted ($0.20) or BYOK Google API (same features, you pay Google directly). Basic tier uses Flash-Lite ($0.0015 hosted).
useAdvancedFeatures.sectionDescription: **Basic (unchecked):** Flash-Lite hosted at $0.0015/event. Fast for simple tasks. **Premium (checked):** Gemini Pro + grounding + RAG at $0.20/event (or $0.05 + your Google API if you provide key below).

llmProvider.title: 🤖 AI Provider (BYOK)
llmProvider.description: Select AI provider for BYOK (Bring Your Own Key). Leave API key blank to use hosted tier instead. BYOK = $0.05 Apify fee + your API costs.
llmProvider.sectionDescription: **No API key?** Leave blank for hosted Basic ($0.0015) or Premium ($0.20). **Have API credits?** BYOK = $0.05 Apify + your API costs. Google BYOK can use Advanced Features (grounding) if checkbox above is checked.

groqApiKey.title: 🔑 Groq API Key (FREE)
groqApiKey.description: Get your FREE API key at console.groq.com (takes 30 seconds). BYOK = $0.05 Apify fee + free Groq API.

anthropicApiKey.title: 🔑 Anthropic API Key
anthropicApiKey.description: Required if using Claude. Get your key at console.anthropic.com. BYOK = $0.05 Apify fee + Claude API costs.

openaiApiKey.title: 🔑 OpenAI API Key
openaiApiKey.description: Required if using GPT-4o. Get your key at platform.openai.com. BYOK = $0.05 Apify fee + OpenAI API costs.

googleApiKey.title: 🔑 Google AI API Key
googleApiKey.description: Get your key at aistudio.google.com. BYOK = $0.05 Apify fee + Google API costs (~$1.25/1M tokens). Enable 'Advanced Features' above for grounding (~$35/1K searches).

outputFormat.title: 📄 Output Format
outputFormat.description: Choose the format for your transformed data

includeGeneratedCode.title: 📝 Include Generated Code
includeGeneratedCode.description: Include the generated Python/Polars code in output for reuse in your own projects

fallbackProvider.title: 🔄 Fallback AI Model
fallbackProvider.description: If primary model fails, try this one (requires corresponding API key)

maxRetries.title: 🔄 Max Retries
maxRetries.description: Number of attempts if code generation fails

enableStreaming.title: 🌊 Enable Streaming
enableStreaming.description: Process large files in chunks. Auto-enabled for files > 100MB.
